overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt trail through tall grass in a dark forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight beam. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, featuring smooth camera movement as the character navigates the winding path and turns around a large tree.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows continuous forward movement along a narrow dirt trail through a dark forest at night. Tall grass flanks both sides of the path while trees line the left side, barely visible in the darkness beyond the flashlight's reach. The environment is quiet and empty, with the camera holder walking steadily through the enclosed natural corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail curve around large tree

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and navigates around a large tree trunk that obstructs the path, turning right to continue along the curving trail. Overhanging branches become visible in the flashlight beam as the character maneuvers past the obstacle, with the path curving into a slightly more open area of the forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a claustrophobic forest corridor that gradually opens as the path curves. It begins with a steady walk along a narrow dirt trail, where a flashlight beam cuts through the darkness to reveal tall grass and a dense line of trees. As the camera advances, the enclosed feeling intensifies until a large tree trunk obstructs the way, forcing the perspective to maneuver around the obstacle. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, passing under overhanging branches that flicker into view within the light. Finally, the trail curves away from the dense foliage and leads the viewer into a slightly more open area of the nocturnal woods.
